sys_security_acl.description:
Allow read for records in x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_template, for users with role x_153465_discovert.tasker_process_template_ou, and if the ACL script returns true.
2.8.3 (Tempate Updates Addon) STRY0141844 - DHS S&T - Permissions for running a template from a task
sys_security_acl.name: x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_template
